analysis.false_positive_analysis: Unable to determine false positive likelihood.

raw_response.summary: The target network appears to have several vulnerabilities, including outdated software versions and missing security headers.

findings.vulnerability: Outdated Nginx version (1.14.0) is vulnerable to multiple CVEs, including CVE-2018-1002105 and CVE-2018-16840.
findings.exploitation: An attacker could exploit these vulnerabilities to perform a denial-of-service (DoS) attack or gain unauthorized access to the system.
findings.remediation: Update Nginx to the latest version (1.22.0 or later) to patch these vulnerabilities.

findings.vulnerability: Outdated Apache version (2.2.31) is vulnerable to multiple CVEs, including CVE-2017-5638 and CVE-2017-7461.
findings.exploitation: An attacker could exploit these vulnerabilities to perform a cross-site scripting (XSS) attack or gain unauthorized access to the system.
findings.remediation: Update Apache to the latest version (2.4.52 or later) to patch these vulnerabilities.

findings.vulnerability: Outdated OpenSSL version (1.0.2k) is vulnerable to multiple CVEs, including CVE-2016-2107 and CVE-2016-2182.
findings.exploitation: An attacker could exploit these vulnerabilities to perform a man-in-the-middle (MitM) attack or gain unauthorized access to the system.
findings.remediation: Update OpenSSL to the latest version (1.1.1n or later) to patch these vulnerabilities.

findings.vulnerability: Outdated PHP version (5.6.40) is vulnerable to multiple CVEs, including CVE-2019-1101 and CVE-2019-1102.
findings.exploitation: An attacker could exploit these vulnerabilities to perform a remote code execution (RCE) attack or gain unauthorized access to the system.
findings.remediation: Update PHP to the latest version (7.4.28 or later) to patch these vulnerabilities.

findings.vulnerability: The target server is missing essential security headers, including Strict-Transport-Security and X-Frame-Options.
findings.exploitation: An attacker could exploit these missing headers to perform a cross-site scripting (XSS) attack or steal sensitive user data.
findings.remediation: Configure the server to include the necessary security headers, such as Strict-Transport-Security and X-Frame-Options.
